docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF AGUIRRE, FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT TURNER, GUY IND. & DBA ABC FENCE CO.
